articles.author: Paul McLeary
articles.title: NATO chief insists Europe is ‘scrambling’ to help with Iran war after latest Trump attacks - Politico
articles.description: The head of the alliance tried to thread the needle between an irate U.S. president and NATO members who feel unfairly maligned.
articles.content:
Allies are doing everything the United States is asking, Rutte said.
Trump reiterated his threats Wednesday night to abandon the alliance.
